name: Upma
steps: Dry roast the rava until fragrant and set aside.
Heat ghee, crackle mustard seeds, then fry chana dal, cashews, onion, chillies, ginger and curry leaves.
Add two and a half cups of water with salt and bring to a rolling boil.
Lower the flame and pour the rava in slowly, stirring continuously.
Cover and steam on low heat for three minutes; fluff and serve hot.
